problem id: c1b427bb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  00101110 -> 00010100
  01101011 -> 10010100
  11011111 -> 10101111
  01111011 -> 10110100
  10000101 -> 00000010
  01010101 -> 10101010
  00000110 -> 00000000
  00011111 -> 00001110
  00110011 -> 00000000
  00010100 -> 00001000

query: 11111000
predicted answer: 01110000
